mapper.select:
SELECT /* CanCustMapper.selectCanCustList */ A.CONTRACT_NUM , (SELECT CD_DSC FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'RCP9004' AND CD_VAL = B.REQ_BUY_TYPE) AS REQ_BUY_TYPE_NM , B.FST_RATE_NM , B.SALE_PLCY_CD AS SALE_PLCY_CD , B.SALE_PLCY_NM , NVL(TRIM(SUBSTR(FST_MODEL_INFO, 21,30)), A.MODEL_NAME) AS FST_MODEL_NM , (SELECT CD_DSC FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'MSP0003' AND CD_VAL = A.SUB_STATUS) AS SUB_STATUS_NM , CASE WHEN A.SUB_STATUS = 'C' THEN CASE WHEN TO_DATE(SUBSTR(A.SUB_STATUS_DATE, 1, 8), 'YYYYMMDD') - TO_DATE(A.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') = 0 THEN '당일개통취소' WHEN TO_DATE(SUBSTR(A.SUB_STATUS_DATE, 1, 8), 'YYYYMMDD') - TO_DATE(A.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') < 15 THEN '14일이내해지' WHEN TO_DATE(SUBSTR(A.SUB_STATUS_DATE, 1, 8), 'YYYYMMDD') - TO_DATE(A.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') < 90 THEN '90일이내해지' ELSE '일반해지' END ELSE '' END AS CAN_RSN , DECODE(A.ON_OFF_TYPE, '1', '오프라인', '온라인') AS ON_OFF_TYPE_NM , (SELECT ORGN_NM FROM ORG_ORGN_INFO_MST WHERE ORGN_ID = A.OPEN_AGNT_CD AND ROWNUM = 1) AS AGENT_NM , A.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE AS OPEN_DT , SUBSTR(A.SUB_STATUS_DATE, 1,8) AS CAN_DT , CASE WHEN SUBSTR(B.SIM_INFO, 36, 1) IN ('A', 'R') THEN (SELECT CD_DSC FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'CMN0058' AND CD_VAL = SUBSTR(B.SIM_INFO, 1, 2)) ELSE (SELECT CD_DSC FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'CMN0058' AND CD_VAL = SUBSTR(B.INST_INFO, 1, 2)) END AS SPRT_TP_NM , B.FST_ESIM_YN FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO A, MSP_REQUEST_DTL B WHERE 1 = 1
AND A.SUB_STATUS_DATE >= #{searchStartDt} || '000000' AND A.SUB_STATUS_DATE <= #{searchEndDt} || '235959'
AND A.SUB_STATUS = 'C' AND A.PPPO = 'PO' AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM
AND A.SUB_LINK_NAME LIKE '%' || #{searchName} || '%'
AND (A.CONTRACT_NUM = #{searchName} OR A.CONTRACT_NUM = (SELECT DISTINCT CONTRACT_NUM FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO_HIST WHERE SVC_CNTR_NO = #{searchName}))
AND A.SUBSCRIBER_NO = #{searchName}
AND A.OPEN_AGNT_CD = #{cntpntShopId}
ORDER BY A.SUB_STATUS_DATE
SELECT SUB_STATUS FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MSP_CAN_REQ ( CAN_REQ_SEQ, CONTRACT_NUM, CUSTOMER_ID, SUBSCRIBER_NO, SVC_CNTR_NO, CNTPLC_NO, ITG_ODER_WHY_CD, AFTMN_INC_IN_CD, APY_REL_TYPE_CD, CUST_TCH_MEDI_CD, SMS_RCV_YN, REGST_ID, REGST_DTTM, REQ_STATUS ) VALUES ( TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') || TRIM(TO_CHAR(SQ_CAN_REQ.NEXTVAL, '000000')), (SELECT SVC_CNTR_NO FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum}), (SELECT CUSTOMER_ID FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum}), (SELECT SUBSCRIBER_NO FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum}), #{contractNum}, '028106300', 'NP01', '13', '01', 'KT', 'N', #{sessionUserId}, SYSDATE, 'N' )

INSERT INTO MSP_CAN_REQ ( CAN_REQ_SEQ, CONTRACT_NUM, CUSTOMER_ID, SUBSCRIBER_NO, SVC_CNTR_NO, CNTPLC_NO, ITG_ODER_WHY_CD, AFTMN_INC_IN_CD, APY_REL_TYPE_CD, CUST_TCH_MEDI_CD, SMS_RCV_YN, REGST_ID, REGST_DTTM, REQ_STATUS, OSST_RSLT_CD, OSST_RSLT_MSG, OSST_RSLT_DTTM ) VALUES ( TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') || TRIM(TO_CHAR(SQ_CAN_REQ.NEXTVAL, '000000')), (SELECT SVC_CNTR_NO FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum}), (SELECT CUSTOMER_ID FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum}), (SELECT SUBSCRIBER_NO FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum}), #{contractNum}, '028106300', 'NP01', '13', '01', 'KT', 'N', #{sessionUserId}, SYSDATE, 'S', 'SKIPPED', '사용 중 상태로 해지 불가합니다.', TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') )
mapper.select: SELECT 1 AS CNT FROM DUAL WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM MSP_CAN_REQ WHERE REQ_STATUS = 'N' )
SELECT 1 AS CNT FROM DUAL WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM CMN_BATCH_REQUEST WHERE BATCH_JOB_ID = 'BATCH00233' AND EXEC_YN = 'N' )
/* CanCustMapper.getCustStatus */ SELECT PROC_CD FROM MCP_CANCEL_REQUEST@DL_MCP WHERE CUST_REQ_SEQ = #{custReqSeq}
